overview: Zoom in for details. This appendix shows the full Paediatric Admission Form and a close‑up view of its key sections.

learningObjectives: Recognise the overall layout of the Paediatric Admission Form.
Identify the major sections (patient details, clinical information, consent, etc.) at a glance.

subsections.subtitle: Full form layout
subsections.content: A complete view of the admission form is provided so learners can see how the different parts are arranged on a single page.

learningObjectives: Locate and interpret the detailed fields within each section of the form.
Understand required entries and how to correctly fill them out.

subsections.subtitle: Zoomed‑in detail
subsections.content: A magnified image highlights the individual fields, labels, and any check‑boxes or signature lines.
